name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-assisted presentations that actually look like you made them.
problem: Generic AI presentation tools produce templated, low-quality slides that undermine professional credibility. Chronicle 2.0 uses AI to accelerate deck creation while preserving design quality and visual originality. Teams can move fast without sacrificing the polish that matters in client-facing or executive contexts.
useCases: Building investor pitch decks with AI-assisted structure and design
Creating client-facing presentations without relying on cookie-cutter templates
Rapid internal slide creation for team updates or strategy reviews
Marketing and sales teams producing on-brand decks at scale
